hero.headline: Your LinkedIn Ads are burning budget.
hero.subhead: Connect your LinkedIn Ads account. Toffu reads every campaign group, campaign, and ad. It shows you the ones spending with no leads and tells you exactly what to do.

demo.content: Pulling 31 campaigns across 6 campaign groups, last 28 days...

**LinkedIn Ads Audit, Last 28 Days**
Total spend: $18,640 | Leads: 94 | Average CPL: $198.30

---

**Wasted Spend Found: $5,210**

1. **Campaign "Director, Finance, Broad Match"** spent **$2,380**, 0 leads
   21 days running, CTR 0.28% (account average 0.71%). Recommend pause.

2. **Campaign "Retargeting, Website Visitors"** spent **$1,640**, CPL **$546** (target $150)
   3.6x over target CPL. Audience too small to scale. Recommend consolidate.

3. **Campaign "Job Function: IT, EU"** spent **$1,190**, 3 leads, CPL $397
   Way over target. Bid too aggressive for audience size. Recommend lower bid or pause.

---

**Targeting Issues:**
- 4 campaigns with audience size under 10,000 (too narrow to exit learning)
- 3 campaign groups bidding on overlapping job titles
- 2 campaigns with no exclusions applied (hitting existing customers)

**I can fix these now:**
- Pause the 3 wasted campaigns ($5,210 of spend protected)
- Move budget to top-2 CPL campaigns
- Flag narrow audiences for expansion

Say "do it" and I'll execute.

findings.title: The specific problems draining your LinkedIn budget

items.title: Campaigns spending with zero leads
items.desc: Campaigns that have been running for weeks without generating a single lead or form fill. You'll see each one, how much it spent, and a recommendation to pause or restructure.

items.title: Campaigns blowing past your target CPL
items.desc: Campaigns where cost-per-lead is 2x or 3x your target. You'll see the exact CPL, how it compares to your goal, and whether to pause or reallocate.

items.title: Audiences too narrow to work
items.desc: Campaigns targeting fewer than 10,000 people, preventing LinkedIn from exiting the learning phase. You'll see which campaigns are stuck and what to expand.

items.title: Overlapping targeting eating your own budget
items.desc: Multiple campaigns bidding on the same job titles, seniorities, or company lists, driving up costs internally. You'll see exactly which campaigns overlap and which to consolidate.

items.title: Low-CTR ads nobody is clicking
items.desc: Creatives with click-through rates well below your account average. You'll see which ads are dragging performance and need replacement.

items.title: Missing exclusions hitting the wrong people
items.desc: Campaigns with no customer list or competitor exclusions applied, wasting impressions on people who will never convert. You'll see the gaps and what to add.

steps.title: Connect your LinkedIn Ads account
steps.desc: One-click OAuth. Takes 10 seconds. Toffu gets read access to your campaign data. Nothing changes unless you tell it to.

steps.title: Run the audit
steps.desc: Type "audit my LinkedIn Ads" and Toffu pulls every campaign group, campaign, and ad. It analyzes the last 28 days in about 60 seconds.

steps.title: See what's wasting money
steps.desc: Get a breakdown of every problem: campaigns with no leads, high-CPL campaigns, narrow audiences, overlapping targeting, weak creatives, and exactly what to do about each one.

afterSection.title: You don't just get a report. You get fixes.
afterSection.subhead: Toffu doesn't stop at telling you what's wrong. It offers to make the changes for you. Say "do it" and it executes.

items.title: Pause wasted campaigns
items.desc: Campaigns with spend and zero leads get flagged. Toffu pauses them across all campaign groups at once.

items.title: Reallocate to winners
items.desc: Spend gets shifted from underperformers to the campaigns actually generating leads. You approve before any budget moves.

items.title: Fix narrow audiences
items.desc: Campaigns stuck in learning due to small audience size get flagged with specific expansion recommendations.

items.title: Replace weak creatives
items.desc: Low-CTR ads get flagged. Toffu can draft new ad copy and headlines based on your top performers.

faq.question: Do I need to stop using LinkedIn Campaign Manager?
faq.answer: No. Toffu connects to your existing LinkedIn Ads account via OAuth. You keep using Campaign Manager exactly as before. Toffu reads your data, finds waste, and can make changes you approve.

faq.question: How long does the audit take?
faq.answer: About 60 seconds. Toffu connects to the LinkedIn Ads API, pulls your campaign data, and analyzes it in real time. No CSV exports, no waiting for a report.

faq.question: Does this work for small accounts?
faq.answer: Yes. LinkedIn Ads are expensive by default, which means even small accounts have meaningful waste to find. The audit works the same whether you spend $2,000/month or $200,000/month.

faq.question: Will Toffu make changes to my account automatically?
faq.answer: Never without your permission. The audit shows you what's wrong and recommends fixes. If you want Toffu to execute a fix, you explicitly tell it to. Nothing happens behind your back.

faq.question: What does it cost?
faq.answer: You get 1000 credits when you sign up, enough to run a full audit. No credit card required. If you want to run more audits or have Toffu fix things, plans start at $100/month.

faq.question: What platforms does Toffu support besides LinkedIn Ads?
faq.answer: Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads, Bing Ads, Google Analytics, Search Console, and more. But this page is about one thing: finding what's wasting money in your LinkedIn Ads account.

finalCta.title: Your LinkedIn Ads are spending right now.
finalCta.subhead: Some of that spend is going to campaigns with no leads, audiences too narrow to convert, and creatives nobody is clicking. Find out which ones in 60 seconds.
